title: USPD - Rekt
relevance_summary: Clandestine Proxy In the Middle of Proxy (CPIMP) attack exploiting a gap between contract deployment and initialization

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deploys and initializes a proxy contract in separate transactions.

red_flags: Gap between contract deployment and initialization
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that deploys and initializes a proxy contract in separate transactions.
summary: USPD suffered a $1 million loss due to a CPIMP attack, where an attacker exploited the gap between contract deployment and initialization to install a shadow regime. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any transactions that deploy and initialize a proxy contract in separate transactions.
